_comment: All providers in this case. negligenceStatus: 'defendant' | 'supporting' | 'neutral'. Update role, dateRange, or notes as needed.

providers.name: Dr. Imran Kayani
providers.title: MD
providers.allegation: 15-year failure to monitor CK or investigate metabolic causes; failure to disclose Jan 2024 rhabdo history to pain management (Dr. Kamath), directly causing catastrophic Aug 2025 event.
keyFacts: Jan 19, 2024: Ordered 44 labs — omitted CK despite clear indication
Feb 13, 2024: Acknowledged rhabdo episode — NO referral, NO counseling
Jul 29, 2025: Ordered 82 labs — omitted CK again
NEVER informed Dr. Kamath of Jan 2024 rhabdomyolysis history
Aug 5, 2025: Saw patient at FPLOL physical while hospitalization was imminent

providers.name: Dr. Michael Rosario-Prieto
providers.title: MD
providers.allegation: 48-day delay in submitting prior authorization for Invitae Metabolic Myopathy Panel (Sep 9 – Oct 28, 2025), violating Fla. Stat. §627.42392. Directly prevented timely diagnosis at critical employment juncture.
keyFacts: Sep 9, 2025: Ordered Invitae panel — stated it was 'critical for diagnosis'
Sep 11, 2025: PA submission delayed despite fax to Invitae
Oct 28, 2025: PA finally submitted — 48 days after order
Patient under active RIF notice (Oct 10, 2025) during entire delay
Repeatedly told patient to 'hold off' on testing

providers.name: Dr. Dilip Kamath
providers.title: MD
providers.allegation: None — victim of Dr. Kayani's communication failure. Performed RFA in good faith without rhabdo history.
keyFacts: Feb 17, 2025: New patient evaluation
Apr 18 & Jun 4, 2025: Bilateral facet medial branch nerve blocks (90%+ relief)
Jul 18, 2025: RFA procedure — NO metabolic precautions (never informed of rhabdo)
Aug 27, 2025: Told patient there was 'no relation to metabolic myopathy' — later abandoned care
Jan 12, 2026: Pain mgmt appointment cancelled — abandonment of care

providers.name: Dr. Gonzalez-Paoli
providers.title: MD
keyFacts: Aug 29, 2025: Post-rhabdo Autoimmune Workup — CK 92 (recovery confirmed)
Sep 24, 2025: Recommended avoiding all exercise; referred to St. Pete Neuromuscular Neurology
Sep 26, 2025: Negative MSA autoimmune panel — transferred metabolic evaluation to Neurology
Oct 6, 2025: Confirmed recurrent CPK elevation with possible metabolic myopathy

providers.name: Dr. Cha Lee
providers.title: MD
keyFacts: Oct 29, 2025: Comprehensive new patient workup — immediate referrals to genetics, neurology, CT
Nov 10, 2025: Ordered full labs including metabolic panel
Actively coordinating Mayo Clinic referral

providers.name: Brandi Jo Centers
providers.title: APRN
keyFacts: Nov 4, 2025: Confirmed probable metabolic/mitochondrial myopathy
Ordered MRI Brain, MR Angio, and nerve conduction study
Feb 11, 2026: Neuromuscular follow-up

providers.name: Dr. Gabriel Pantol
providers.title: MD
keyFacts: Nov 11, 2025: EMG/Nerve Conduction Study — normal, confirms metabolic (not structural) cause
This definitively rules out structural causes — critical for legal argument

providers.name: Dr. Sivaram Rajan
providers.title: MD
keyFacts: Jan 25, 2024: Admitted Kevin for first rhabdomyolysis episode
Managed hospitalization with IV hydration

providers.name: Dr. Somasekhar Reddy Kaipu
providers.title: MD
keyFacts: Aug 5-8, 2025: Admitted for second (catastrophic) rhabdomyolysis
Jan 26, 2024: Also treated during first episode
Discharge advised: avoid strenuous activity, CK recheck in 1 week

providers.name: Dr. Patrick M. Hawkins
providers.title: MD
keyFacts: Feb 26, 2025: Multiple spine MRIs confirming degenerative changes
Oct 2012: Prior spine imaging

providers.name: Latisha Blanchard
providers.title: PMHNP
keyFacts: Oct 20, 2025: Reported severe mental stress due to job termination, confirmed metabolic myopathy suspicion
Monitoring psychiatric medications (Sertraline, Bupropion, Adderall)

providers.name: Mayo Clinic Genetics
providers.organization: Mayo Clinic – Mitochondrial Medicine & Undiagnosed Diseases Program
keyFacts: Feb 24, 2026: Consultation for advanced testing and variant correlation
Will move VUS findings to definitive genetic etiology — final medical support for permanent disability
